# Canvas Design Skill

## Core Methodology

**Phase 1** produces a markdown design philosophy -- an aesthetic manifesto articulating visual principles around form, space, color, and composition. "Ideas communicate through space, form, color, composition -- not paragraphs."

**Phase 2** translates philosophy into museum-quality visual artifacts emphasizing "meticulously crafted" execution.

## Key Principles

- **Minimal text integration**: Language functions as visual accent, never explanatory blocks
- **Conceptual subtlety**: References embedded sophisticatedly, intuitive rather than literal
- **Design-first approach**: Information lives in visual hierarchy, spatial relationships, and chromatic systems
- **Professional execution**: Every element positioned precisely with breathing room
- **Creative interpretation**: Philosophy provides guidance while permitting artistic freedom

## Output Requirements

Deliverables include both .md (philosophy document) and .pdf/.png (visual artifact) files, treating designs as potential gallery pieces rather than decorative documents.
